---
  title: "Module V"
---
  
  # Spatial Epidemiology, Risk Mapping and Decision Support Systems
  
  ## Topics
  
  ### GIS Fundamentals
  
  ### Remote Sensing
  
  ### Spatial Statistics
  
  ### Disease Mapping
  
  ### Species Distribution Models
  
  ### Decision Support Systems
  
  ## Practical Sessions
  
  - QGIS workflows
- Risk mapping
- Suitability modelling
